venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur, New Chandigarh
pitch_text: Mullanpur (New Chandigarh), day game — Dale Steyn: not a 220–230 surface; recent games in the ~160–170 band; slower deck, bowlers stay in the game; hold length; batters must create pace; new ball then wears into a trickier, slower phase; evening may skid a touch more. No dew (afternoon). Context: SRH have won the last four H2H meetings; both sides have power — SRH top order especially destructive on better surfaces, but this pitch tempers raw ball-striking vs a bowling-heavy read.
notes: Match 17: PK won toss, chose to bowl → SRH bat first (team1). Impact pools — SRH: Jaydev Unadkat, Liam Livingstone, Shivam Mavi, Praful Hinge, Kamindu Mendis. PK: Nehal Wadhera, Vishnu Vinod, Suryansh Shedge, Yash Thakur, Harpreet Brar. Process 1A: --team1-impact JD Unadkat, --team2-impact nehal-wadhera; registry/coach slugs (salil-arora, shivang-kumar, prabhsimran-singh, cooper-connolly, marco-jansen); Nithish vs Nitish spelling in features; --no-squad-check as needed.
